name: Stack Fan Settle — Playing Card Spread
description: Cards start stacked at center, fan out in a rotated spread like fanning playing cards, then spring-settle into a final grid or list layout. Physics-driven settle with configurable damping creates an organic, weighty feel.

fanAngle.description: Maximum rotation angle in degrees for the outermost cards during fan

spreadRadius.description: Radius of the fan spread in pixels from center

settleDelay.description: Stagger delay in ms between each card starting its settle phase

springStiffness.description: Spring stiffness for the settle phase

springDamping.description: Spring damping for the settle phase

gridColumns.description: Number of columns in the final grid layout

gridGap.description: Gap between cards in the final grid in pixels

cardWidth.description: Width of each card in pixels

cardHeight.description: Height of each card in pixels

sub_primitives.name: Fan Spread
sub_primitives.description: Rotational fan-out from a stacked center point with staggered timing. Each card rotates to its arc position.

sub_primitives.name: Spring Settle
sub_primitives.description: Damped spring animation from fan position to final grid/list target. Requires JS physics — spring stiffness and damping drive the settle curve.

when_to_use: Feature comparisons — revealing multiple options from a single source
Option reveals — showing choices that emerge from a unified concept
Portfolio showcases — spreading out work samples with theatrical flair
when_to_avoid: More than 8 cards — visual clutter during the fan phase
Scenes under 2 seconds — fan+settle needs time to read
Neutral-light personality — too theatrical for tutorial contexts
ai_guidance: Use layer type 'stack_fan_settle' with a 'cards' array of { title, description, icon }. Configure physics via fan_config overrides. Phase 1 (0-40%) fans cards out with rotation stagger, Phase 2 (40-100%) spring-settles to grid. Duration ~2.8s.
